bupt.ta.util

类 JobActivity

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.util.JobActivity

  • public final class JobActivity
extends java.lang.Object
    Whether a job is still "active" for MO day-to-day management (My Jobs). Inactive = manually closed or application deadline has passed (date only, yyyy-MM-dd).

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static java.lang.String PATH_ACTIVE 
      static java.lang.String PATH_INACTIVE 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static boolean closeOpenJobIfDeadlinePassed(Job job)
      If the job is still OPEN but the deadline has passed, set status to CLOSED (call before persisting).
      static boolean isActive(Job job) 
      static boolean isApplicationDeadlinePast(java.lang.String deadline)
      True if the application deadline date (yyyy-MM-dd prefix) is strictly before today.
      static boolean isInactive(Job job) 
      static java.lang.String listPathFor(Job job) 

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • PATH_ACTIVE

        public static final java.lang.String PATH_ACTIVE
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • PATH_INACTIVE

        public static final java.lang.String PATH_INACTIVE
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

    • 方法详细资料

      • isInactive

        public static boolean isInactive(Job job)
        参数:
        job - job posting
        返回:
        true when closed or past the application deadline

      • isActive

        public static boolean isActive(Job job)
        参数:
        job - job posting
        返回:
        true when the job is still open and before deadline

      • listPathFor

        public static java.lang.String listPathFor(Job job)
        参数:
        job - job posting
        返回:
        PATH_ACTIVE or PATH_INACTIVE for MO navigation

      • isApplicationDeadlinePast

        public static boolean isApplicationDeadlinePast(java.lang.String deadline)
        True if the application deadline date (yyyy-MM-dd prefix) is strictly before today. Missing or unparseable deadlines are not treated as past.

      • closeOpenJobIfDeadlinePassed

        public static boolean closeOpenJobIfDeadlinePassed(Job job)
        If the job is still OPEN but the deadline has passed, set status to CLOSED (call before persisting).
        返回:
        true if the in-memory job was modified
